title: Language Code
documentation:
## Purpose
Carries a two-letter language code that machines use to tag or constrain content by language. Functionally equivalent to [Language](https://capdag.com/browse/media:language;textable) but signals explicit BCP 47 intent.

## When to use
Use this type when a machine port is documented to accept a language code rather than a free-text language name. Both types share the same validation set, so they are interchangeable in most graphs.

## Notes
Allowed values: `en`, `es`, `fr`, `de`, `it`, `pt`, `ru`, `zh`, `ja`, `ko`. For general language selection, [Language](https://capdag.com/browse/media:language;textable) is preferred unless the downstream machine specifically requires a coded value.
